{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44162", "cvss": {"score": 2.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 2.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "The `fluent-plugin-s3` plugin (specifically the `in_s3` input plugin) supports reading and decompressing heavily compressed files (such as `gzip`, `lzma2`, and `lzop`) from Amazon S3. 
It was discovered that the plugin read the entire decompressed payload into memory at once without enforcing a strict size limit.

If an attacker has sufficient permissions to upload files to the monitored S3 bucket, they can upload a maliciously crafted, highly compressed file.
When Fluentd attempts to decompress this file, it will expand to an excessive size and it will consume significant system resources.

### Impact
This vulnerability allows for a **Denial of Service (DoS)** attack via memory exhaustion. 
The rapid memory consumption during decompression can lead to an Out-of-Memory kill of the Fluentd process by the operating system, 
This results in the disruption of all log collection on the affected node.

### Patches
v1.8.5

### Workarounds
If an immediate upgrade is not possible, mitigate the risk by applying strict IAM access controls:

1. Restrict Bucket Access
   * Ensure that write (PUT) access to the S3 bucket monitored by `in_s3` is strictly limited to trusted services and administrators. Prevent any public or untrusted uploads to the S3 bucket.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T17:02:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44162"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T17:02:19Z", "references": ["https://github.com/fluent/fluent-plugin-s3/security/advisories/GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh", "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-plugin-s3/commit/e085aee001d15bcc4bd073507e74075e30550fd0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/fluent/fluent-plugin-s3/security-advisories/GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/fluent/fluent-plugin-s3", "summary": "fluent-plugin-s3 Vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) via Decompression Bomb in `in_s3`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T17:02:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xv9w-7v6q-hpjh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "fluent-plugin-s3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.7.0, <= 1.8.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: fluent-plugin-s3 Vulnerable to Denial of Service (DoS) via Decompression Bomb in `in_s3`
